title: Archived - Applying for a Drug Identification Number (DIN) for a disinfectant drug during the COVID-19 pandemic: For more information - Canada.ca
content:
## Archived - Applying for a Drug Identification Number (DIN) for a disinfectant drug during the COVID-19 pandemic: For more information
- Purpose and eligible products
- Determine your application
- Prepare your application
- Submit your application
- Application flexibilities
- For more information
- Other guidance documents

### Natural and Non-prescription Health Products Directorate
Natural and Non-prescription Health Products Directorate Health Products and Food Branch Health Canada 250 Lanark Avenue Address Locator 2002B Ottawa, Ontario K1A 0K9 (Canada Post delivery including Xpress Post) K1Z 1G4 (Courier service excluding Xpress Post)
E-mail: nnhpd.consultation-dpsnso@hc-sc.gc.ca

### eReview within Office of Submissions and Intellectual Property
E-mail : hc.ereview.sc@canada.ca

### Healthy Environments and Consumer Safety Branch
E-mail: hc.ccpsa-lcspc.sc@canada.ca

### Pest Management Regulatory Agency
E-mail: pmra.subject.to.regulation-sujet.a.la.reglementation.arla@hc-sc.gc.ca

## Other guidance documents
The relevant monograph and/or Labelling Standard to use is the Hard Surface Disinfectants monograph.
For information on the safety, efficacy or quality information to support application, please refer to:
- Safety and Efficacy Requirements for Hard Surface Disinfectant Drugs (2020)
- Guidance Document: Disinfectant Drugs (2020)
- Post-Drug Identification Number (DIN) Changes Guidance Document
- Guidance Document: Post-Notice of Compliance (NOC) Changes: Quality Document
- Post-Notice of Compliance (NOC) Changes: Safety and Efficacy Document
Other guidance documents and webpages that you should read in parallel to this guide include:
Submitting your application
- Regulatory Enrolment Process
- Preparation of Regulatory Activities in the “Non-eCTD Electronic-Only” Format
- Common Electronic Submissions Gateway
- Filing submissions electronically
- Guideline on Preparation of DIN Submissions
- Guidance Document: Fees for the Review of Human and Disinfectant Drug Submissions and Applications
- Guidance Document: Regulatory requirements for Drug Identification Numbers (DINs)
- Guidance Document: Administrative Processing of Submissions and Applications Involving Human or Disinfectant Drugs
- Guidance document: Management of Disinfectant Drug Applications (2020)
- Guidance Document: Post-Drug Identification Number (DIN) Changes
- Guidance document on Post-Notice of Compliance (NOC) Changes: Framework Document (Pharmaceutical, biologic and radiopharmaceutical drugs for human use only)
